case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FABRICIO SERGIO DE MORAES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICURZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FABRICIO SERGIO DE MORAES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE MORAES, FABRICIO SERGIO $574.46 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $654.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE MORAES, FABRICIO SERGIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $574.46 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE MORAES, FABRICIO SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
